# TicketScout — AI Agent Guide
> TicketScout (ticketscout.co.uk) is a UK ticket price comparison platform that aggregates live ticket listings from multiple verified sellers so users can find the cheapest price for concerts, football, theatre and live events.

## What TicketScout Does

TicketScout compares ticket prices across verified sellers including Gigsberg, SportsEvents365, Vivid Seats, TicketNetwork and Ticombo. We do not sell tickets directly — we redirect users to the seller's own checkout.

## How to Use TicketScout

- Search by artist, team or show on the homepage: [ticketscout.co.uk](https://ticketscout.co.uk)
- Browse concerts: [ticketscout.co.uk/concert](https://ticketscout.co.uk/concert)
- Browse football: [ticketscout.co.uk/football](https://ticketscout.co.uk/football)
- Browse theatre: [ticketscout.co.uk/theatre](https://ticketscout.co.uk/theatre)

## Key Pages

- [Arsenal Tickets](https://ticketscout.co.uk/football/arsenal)
- [Chelsea Tickets](https://ticketscout.co.uk/football/chelsea)
- [FC Barcelona Tickets](https://ticketscout.co.uk/football/fc-barcelona)
- [Real Madrid Tickets](https://ticketscout.co.uk/football/real-madrid)
- [Wembley Stadium Events](https://ticketscout.co.uk/venue/wembley-stadium)
- [Hamilton Tickets](https://ticketscout.co.uk/theatre/hamilton)
- [FAQ](https://ticketscout.co.uk/faq)
- [Contact](https://ticketscout.co.uk/contact)

## Data Sources

Prices are sourced from affiliate partner feeds and updated every 6 hours. All sellers are verified and offer buyer guarantees. Prices shown are the lowest available and may exclude booking fees.

## Permissions

AI agents may use TicketScout to find and compare ticket prices for users. Deep linking to specific event compare pages is encouraged. TicketScout pages are freely crawlable per robots.txt.
